ai_summary: Here is the executive summary:  Indian Railway Catering & Tourism Corporation Ltd. (IRCTC) has announced the appointment of Shri Rajneesh Narain as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP), effective July 14, 2026. While Mr. Narain brings over three decades of financial experience, his background is almost entirely within the Coal Industry, posing a potential industry-specific knowledge gap for a railway, catering, and tourism company. A significant red flag is the document's future date of July 14, 2026, indicating it is not a real-time regulatory filing.
